headline: What you're looking for
summary: Full-time entry-level marketing roles with hands-on campaign, brand, and digital work—teams that value experimentation, clear metrics, and collaboration.
keyDetails: Campaign and brand execution (not only pure paid-media trafficking)
Exposure to analytics, reporting, or testing—not solely creative-only
Employers in Greater Boston, NYC, or RI, or strong hybrid/remote with East Coast touchpoints
Mission-driven, premium consumer, or high-trust brands (CPG, hospitality, education, health)
